title: Bridge Eggs by Juix
description: Datapack adding bridge eggs you can throw, building bridges in front of you
body:
# ℹ️ Bridge Eggs By Juix The Bridge Eggs pack adds bridge eggs to your game, crafted from ender pearls for balancing. It is very useful when your world has an amplified or modded generation like Tectonic's one with huge mountains.

You can also reach islands easier in the Nether, forget about the days when you missed your ender pearl and fell into the lava. A bridge takes longer to cross, but it's safer and perfect for traveling in small groups!

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b01a8c9495972338db0b3596d82d0d37a9ca0c7b.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.3+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes & Details Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft two types of Bridge Eggs : - **Leaf Bridge Egg** : made from leaves - **Ice Bridge Egg** : made from ice

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c67fdd2f79ef5f0a5c0c77a1c1ab1272378427b.png)
# 🪳 Known issues - No known issue for now Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
